Tests the associative property of addition with JavaScript's `Number.MAX_VALUE`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the associativity of addition with JavaScript's `Number.MAX_VALUE`. It verifies that the expression `-Number.MAX_VALUE + Number.MAX_VALUE + Number.MAX_VALUE` is equal to `(-Number.MAX_VALUE + Number.MAX_VALUE) + Number.MAX_VALUE`. This test ensures that the addition operation behaves as expected when using the maximum representable number in JavaScript. The code is a narrow functionality script focused on validating a specific arithmetic property.
